overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking along a forest path past a wooden hut and through lush greenery with dynamic sunlight filtering through the trees. The character explores a vibrant summer forest with dense vegetation and wildflowers.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path approaching a wooden hut

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward a rustic wooden hut surrounded by wildflowers

entered.detail: small rustic wooden structure with sloped roof situated beside the path
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with patches of grass
simple wooden post fence running alongside the path near the hut
white and purple wildflowers growing in dense patches along the trail edges

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit dirt path through a lush summer forest, approaching a small wooden hut. Wildflowers line the path edges and a simple wooden fence is visible near the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path circling a wooden structure

events.description: character turns left to circle around the wooden hut and rejoin the main path

agents.ego_description: turning around the wooden hut and heading back toward the main forest path

segments.scene_description: The character circles around the wooden hut, causing it to pass out of view behind them. The path continues through dense forest vegetation as the character reorients toward the trail ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with sun rays

events.description: entering denser forest canopy with prominent sun rays filtering through the trees

agents.ego_description: walking through a densely wooded area with tall grass and wildflowers on both sides

entered.detail: bright beams of sunlight piercing through the dense tree canopy creating god rays
wooden fence posts appearing on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path enters a denser section of forest where sunlight filters through the canopy creating dramatic light rays. The character continues walking past tall grass and wildflowers with a wooden fence visible on the left.

events.description: approaching a fork in the forest path with wooden fences on both sides

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path and passing through a trail junction surrounded by forest

entered.detail: fork in the dirt path offering two directions forward through the forest
wooden fence posts running along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a junction in the forest trail, with wooden fences lining both sides of the path. The dense canopy opens up slightly as the trail continues forward through the lush green forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit summer forest that transitions from a small rural clearing into a dense, light-dappled woodland. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path lined with wildflowers toward a small wooden hut and a simple fence. As the character circles the structure, the hut recedes from view and the trail pushes deeper into the lush vegetation. The scene then shifts into a denser section of the forest where the canopy tightens, causing sunlight to filter through the leaves in dramatic rays over tall grass and wooden fencing. Finally, the camera passes through a fenced trail junction as the canopy opens slightly, continuing forward into the vibrant greenery.
